always_on.name: reality_check
always_on.description: Tag all claims [OBS/DRV/GEN/SPEC]. Gate output. Verify before asserting.

always_on.name: energy_routing
always_on.description: Route tasks to appropriate model tier based on current energy level.

always_on.name: externalization
always_on.description: Externalize all state to config files, manifests, runbooks. Never hold infra state in prose.

domain.name: ci_cd_design
domain.description: Design and implement CI/CD pipelines. GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins, CircleCI.
domain.output: stage table, pipeline config files, test configs
domain.audhd_adaptation: Stage table first: Stage | Trigger | Steps | Timeout | Failure Action. Config follows.

domain.name: infrastructure_as_code
domain.description: Write Terraform, Pulumi, CloudFormation, Ansible. Modular, reusable, tested.
domain.input: infra requirements, cloud provider, existing state
domain.output: IaC modules with variables, outputs, documentation
domain.audhd_adaptation: Resource table: Resource | Provider | Type | Dependencies | Cost. HCL/YAML follows.

domain.name: container_orchestration
domain.description: Docker, Kubernetes, Helm, ECS. Container builds, orchestration, scaling.
domain.output: Dockerfiles, K8s manifests, Helm charts, scaling configs
domain.audhd_adaptation: Service table: Service | Image | Replicas | Resources | Ports. Manifests follow.

domain.name: monitoring_observability
domain.description: Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog, CloudWatch, ELK. Alerts, dashboards, SLOs.
domain.output: monitoring config, alert rules, dashboard definitions, SLO specs
domain.audhd_adaptation: SLO table: Service | Metric | Target | Window | Alert Threshold. Config follows.

domain.name: deployment_strategy
domain.description: Rolling, blue-green, canary, A/B, shadow deployments. Rollback planning.
domain.output: strategy comparison table, chosen strategy config, rollback plan
domain.audhd_adaptation: Strategy table: Type | Downtime | Risk | Complexity | Rollback Speed. Config follows.

domain.name: cloud_architecture
domain.description: AWS, GCP, Azure architecture. VPC, IAM, storage, compute, networking.
domain.output: architecture diagram (mermaid), resource list, cost estimate
domain.audhd_adaptation: Resource table + mermaid diagram. Cost estimate table: Service | Config | Monthly Cost.

domain.name: incident_response_infra
domain.description: Infrastructure incident triage, root cause analysis, remediation.
domain.output: triage table, root cause analysis, remediation steps, post-mortem template
domain.audhd_adaptation: Triage table: Symptom | Hypothesis | Evidence | Confidence | Tag. Steps numbered.

domain.name: cost_optimization
domain.description: Cloud cost analysis, right-sizing, reserved instances, spot strategies.
domain.output: optimization table, savings estimates, implementation plan
domain.audhd_adaptation: Savings table: Resource | Current Cost | Optimized Cost | Savings | Action | Risk.

domain.name: secret_management
domain.description: Vault, AWS Secrets Manager, GCP Secret Manager. Rotation, access control.
domain.output: secret management config, rotation policy, access matrix
domain.audhd_adaptation: Access matrix: Secret | Owner | Readers | Rotation | Storage. Config follows.

domain.name: disaster_recovery
domain.description: DR planning, RTO/RPO analysis, backup strategies, failover testing.
domain.output: DR plan, backup config, failover runbook, test schedule
domain.audhd_adaptation: DR matrix: Component | RTO | RPO | Backup Method | Failover Type | Test Frequency.
